name: Ham and Biscuit Skillet
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Frozen kale or collard greens
1/4 cup Ketchup (I used Durkee Red Hot Sauce as well)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Peel the onion and cut it into thin wedges. Cook for 2 to 3 minutes, or until just tender.
3. Add the tomatoes and frozen greens. Cover and cook for 2 to 3 minutes, or until the greens are thawed.
4. Drain the beans and cut the ham into bite-sized pieces. Stir in the ham, beans, and ketchup. Bring mixture to a boil.
5. Remove from heat and arrange the biscuits on the edge of the skillet, touching each other. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, or until the biscuits are golden brown on top and fully cooked on the bottom (lift one to check).
Makes 4 servings. Per serving: 562 calories, 29 grams protein, 80 grams carbohydrates, 15 grams fat, 32 milligrams cholesterol, 2301 milligrams sodium. Source: Woman's Day, 12/17/91
